scripts.postinstall: npm run build:eliza -w background-agents && cd packages/web && npx prisma generate
scripts.dev: cd packages/web && prisma generate && next dev --webpack
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd packages/simple-chat && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: cd packages/simple-chat && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:status: cd packages/simple-chat && npx prisma migrate status
scripts.build: npm run build -w background-agents && npm run build -w @upstream/web && npm run build -w @upstream/simple-chat
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w background-agents && npm run build -w @upstream/web
scripts.build:simple-chat: npm run build -w background-agents && npm run build -w @upstream/simple-chat
